title: Replace Football Bros game page with embedded footballbros.io iframe

requirements.summary: Replace the custom React Three Fiber 3D game in FootballBrosGame.tsx with a full-screen iframe embedding https://footballbros.io, keeping the retro arcade theme, page title, leaderboard, and score submission intact
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /football-bros renders an iframe with src='https://footballbros.io' that fills the main content area.
The iframe has no visible border and is at least 600px tall.
No Three.js canvas, React Three Fiber Canvas, or useFootballBrosGame hook is rendered on this page.
The page retains the retro neon arcade heading/title for Football Bros.
The Leaderboard and ScoreSubmission components remain present below the iframe, consistent with other game pages.

file_operations.description: Replace the entire React Three Fiber Canvas and 3D game scene with a full-screen iframe element (src='https://footballbros.io'). Remove all imports and references to useFootballBrosGame, @react-three/fiber, and @react-three/drei. Keep the page structure with the retro neon arcade heading 'Football Bros', the iframe styled with min-height 600px or 100vh minus header (no border, full width), and the Leaderboard and ScoreSubmission components below the iframe. Maintain consistent spacing and neon theme styling matching other game pages.

requirements.summary: Remove the unused useFootballBrosGame hook file since the Football Bros page now uses an iframe instead of custom game logic
acceptanceCriteria: The file `frontend/src/hooks/useFootballBrosGame.ts` no longer exists or is empty.
The application builds without errors after removal.

file_operations.description: Delete the useFootballBrosGame.ts hook file as it is no longer used by the iframe-based Football Bros page. Verify no other files import from this hook before deletion.
